box-shadow: 0px 0px 22px #000; text-align: center; } .box .solution-text{ font-family: "Game Of Squids"; color: #ff00b2; padding: 0 50px; font-size: 1rem; width: 100%; } .box h1{ color: #ff00b2; } .box span{ color: #ff7ad7; } .box input[type="submit"]{ display: block; margin: 1.5rem auto; padding: .6rem .9rem; background: none; outline: none; border: 2px solid #ff00b2; text-align: center; border-radius: 5px; color: #fff; } .box input[type="submit"]:hover{ color: #000; font-weight: 600; background: #ff7ad7; border-color: #ff7ad7; } .box p{ display: block; padding: 1rem; background: none; text-align: center; transition: 0.25s;
